Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Oct-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Defendant CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION ET AL's Motion For Change Of Venue.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Grant, no opposition filed. The case is transferred to San Mateo County.

Counsel for prevailing party is to submit a proposed order to Dept. 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)
